Description
org.jscience.social.history.clock
Provides the org.jscience.social.history.time module.

  • Uses of TimeListener in org.jscience.social.history.clock

    Classes in org.jscience.social.history.clock that implement TimeListener
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AlarmClock
    An abstract alarm clock that triggers an action when a specified target time is reached.
    class 
    BasicClock
    A basic clock implementation using standard ModernTime.
    class 
    ChronometerClock
    A chronometer (stopwatch) implementation that measures elapsed time.
    class 
    Clock
    An abstract base class for clock implementations that observe a TimeServer.
    class 
    CountdownClock
    A clock that counts down from a target duration.
    Methods in org.jscience.social.history.clock that return TimeListener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TimeListener[]
    TimeServer.getTimeListeners()
    Returns an array of all currently registered time listeners.
    Methods in org.jscience.social.history.clock with parameters of type TimeListener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    TimeServer.addTimeListener(TimeListener listener)
    Adds a listener to be notified of time updates.
    void
    TimeServer.removeTimeListener(TimeListener listener)
    Removes a listener from the notification list.
